item.title: Denmark election: What's on the line for Orsted, Vestas and wind industry
item.description: Right-wing parties are pushing for government to sell stake in Orsted and are sceptical of proposed energy island linking to offshore wind farms

item.title: Offshore wind could drive billions in US steelmaking – if it ever gets built
item.description: Industry group highlights $42bn steelmaking upside but comes as administration is reportedly willing to refund developers to walk away from offshore wind projects

item.title: Deals of the Week: Nordex double in core market; UK onshore acquisition
UK military orders new radars that can live with offshore wind
item.description: Industry group says order could clear path for 10GW of projects

item.title: UK to install new radars that can live with offshore wind
item.description: Industry group says order could clear path for 10GW of projects

item.title: Ocean Winds decides to relinquish 500MW ScotWind floating wind project
item.description: Ocean Winds has been a vocal critic of UK transmission charges that aim to recoup costs but unfairly impact the business case for some prime offshore wind projects

item.title: Equinor exec: No incentives to invest in renewable energy
item.description: Equinor’s former head of renewables, Irene Rummelhoff, was shocked when she realised how aligned European industry is in its criticism of the EU’s emissions trading system

item.title: European offshore wind investments grew fivefold in one year: BloombergNEF
item.description: European wind investments will overtake solar this year if current trends keep up, according to a new report

item.title: Blade breaks off at German wind farm despite recent maintenance
item.description: Senvion turbine was manufactured in 2012 and last maintenance inspection was carried out in November

item.title: Europe to outpace China as world's biggest offshore wind market
item.description: Europe expected to overtake China in pace of offshore wind farm installations this year, and establish dominance in the 2030s, says new report

item.title: Equinor reveals bruising losses thanks to Trump attacks on Empire Wind
item.description: Trump administration has twice brought work on offshore wind farm being developed off New York to a shuddering halt through stop work orders

item.title: Vestas tops German and Chinese rivals on offshore wind orders last year
item.description: World Forum Offshore Wind report also points to super-sized models of the future and a five-year low in installations last year

item.title: Energy independence an illusion warn power giants' strategy chiefs
item.description: Executives from Vattenfall, SSE and National Grid ponder lessons of war in Iran for European energy system

item.title: EU warned over energy investment danger as leaders mull Iran response
item.description: Leaders told tinkering with fundamental mechanisms could endanger transition goals but major power users demand action on prices

item.title: 'Rust battery' multi-day storage pioneer gets EU debut with state-backed renewables player
item.description: Form Energy, backed by likes of Bill Gates and GE Vernova, pland to deliver multi-day energy storage in Ireland

item.title: Form Energy gets EU debut with state-backed renewables player
item.description: Form Energy, backed by likes of Bill Gates and GE Vernova, pland to deliver multi-day energy storage in Ireland

item.title: 'Let's end the culture war' says UK renewables boss who embraces role for gas
item.description: RenewableUK boss wants a less ideologically-charged debate over energy but her comments were seized upon by right-wing critics of energy minister Ed Miliband

item.title: Spain's biggest wind farm project at risk in corruption probe
item.description: Planned 125-turbine project is facing legal paralysis amid a criminal investigation into alleged environmental corruption

item.title: Major CIP wind project at risk under Spanish corruption probe
item.description: Planned 125-turbine project is facing legal paralysis amid a criminal investigation into alleged environmental corruption

item.title: What Japan needs in a 'make or break year' for offshore wind auctions
item.description: Japan's revised auction system will place more emphasis on project execution and tackling the so-called race to the bottom, but pricing will still be key

item.title: What Japan needs to do in a 'make or break year' for offshore wind auctions
item.description: Japan's revised auction system will place more emphasis on project execution and tackling the so-called race to the bottom, but pricing will still be key

item.title: Trump to buy out TotalEnergies' $1bn offshore wind leases: NY Times
item.description: The newspaper said it had seen documents showing the administration would pay back almost all funds spent by the French developer in exchange for investment in gas

item.title: New partner joins BayWa r.e. and Elicio in French floating wind project
item.description: South Brittany project could be a ground-breaker for floating offshore wind, but aggressive pricing means costs will have to be squeezed

item.title: Corio CEO nominated for Orsted board of directors as Macquarie unit prepares to wind down
item.description: Leupold – who was once head of wind at Orsted predecessor Dong Energy – is expected to leave his current post as CEO of Corio Generation

item.title: Trump faces appeals dilemma as clock winds down offshore wind stop-work orders
item.description: Senator in key infrastructure role threatens to hold up bipartisan permit reform if administration appeals court decisions

item.title: 海上风电支撑系统（四）：波罗的海——波兰的成功与等待政策明朗
item.description: 这是Recharge系列文章的第四篇，该系列旨在探讨欧洲主要海上风电市场中的海床分配与支持体系，本篇将聚焦波罗的海沿岸国家，从波兰到爱沙尼亚。【原文：This is the fourth of a series of articles by Recharge examining seabed allocation and support systems across Europe's most relevant offshore wind markets, continuing with Baltic Sea nations from Poland to Estonia】

item.title: Offshore wind support systems part four: Poland emerges as Baltic success story
item.description: This is the fourth of a series of articles by Recharge examining seabed allocation and support systems across Europe's most relevant offshore wind markets, continuing with Baltic Sea nations from Poland to Estonia

item.title: 美国首个“永久性”海上风电场竣工
item.description: CIP-Iberdrola旗下的800兆瓦Vineyard Wind风电场上周完成了最后一台GE风机的安装，标志着该项目历时十年的开发工作圆满收官【原文：CIP-Iberdrola’s 800MW Vineyard Wind finished installation of final GE turbine last week, capping a decade of development】

item.title: 欧盟能源部长们被敦促摒弃对石油和天然气的“不切实际”依赖
item.description: 随着能源价格上涨带来的政治压力日益加剧，欧盟因是否放宽对俄罗斯石油和天然气的制裁而面临分裂的风险【原文：The EU is in danger of splitting over whether to ease sanctions on Russian oil and gas as the political pressure of higher energy prices begins to bite】

item.title: 问题风电场内第三片GE涡轮机叶片断裂
item.description: 位于瑞典北部的比约克瓦特内特风电场在建设期间已发生过起重机事故，此前还发生过两起叶片断裂事件【原文：Björkvattnet wind farm in northern Sweden already suffered crane accidents during construction and two earlier blade breaks】
